title: simulate monday-context in an app not in monday (localhost)
excerpt:
is there a way to simulate monday-context in an app not in monday? Purpose would be so that i can look at the app im creating in the browser without the monday iframe.

posts.author: ContactOmarNow (Omar Habash)
posts.cookedHtml:
is there a way to simulate monday-context in an app not in monday? Purpose would be so that i can look at the app im creating in the browser without the monday iframe.

I suppose it would be easy. Just wondering if anyone with experience had any more to add to this.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ContactOmarNow,

If the question is if it is possible to use our SDK to get the “context” outside of a monday environment, it can not be achieved as far as I know (never seen a possible workaround to mimic the environment).
